     The Numbers Business Report

Johnny English Strikes Again (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,412,170Details
International Box Office $154,957,108
Worldwide Box Office $159,369,278
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $203,500
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $134,404
Total $337,904
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A cyber-attack reveals the identity of all active undercover agents in Britain, leaving Johnny English as the secret service’s last hope. Called out of retirement, English dives head first into action with the mission to find the mastermind hacker. As a man with few skills and analogue methods, Johnny English must overcome the challenges of modern technology to make this mission a success.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,638,895 (37.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:2.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:544 opening theaters/552 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,792,491

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 26th, 2018 (Limited) by Focus Features
International Releases: September 13th, 2018 (Wide) (Paraguay)
September 13th, 2018 (Wide) (Uruguay)
September 14th, 2018 (Wide) (Mexico)
September 14th, 2018 (Wide) (Colombia)
September 14th, 2018 (Wide) (Venezuela)
Video Release: January 22nd, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some action violence, rude humor, language and brief nudity
(Rating bulletin 2533 (Cert #51397), 6/27/2018)
Running Time: 88 minutes
Franchise: Johnny English
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Geographical setting: England
Plot point: Car Chase, Cyber Warfare, Cybercrimes, Out of Retirement, Secret Agent, Spoof, Undercover
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: StudioCanal, Working Title Films
Production Countries: United Kingdom, France, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A cyber-attack reveals the identity of all active undercover agents in Britain, leaving Johnny English as the secret service’s last hope. Called out of retirement, English dives head first into action with the mission to find the mastermind hacker. As a man with few skills and analogue methods, Johnny English must overcome the challenges of modern technology to make this mission a success.
